hero.title: Get in touch
hero.subtitle: Have questions? We're here to help. Contact our team or send us a message.

form.title: Send us a message

message.label: Message *
message.placeholder: Tell us more about your needs...

form.success: Thank you for contacting us! We will get back to you soon.

gettingStarted.question: How quickly can I get started?
gettingStarted.answer: You can start using PharmaSaaS within minutes. Sign up for a free trial, add your first branch, and start managing your pharmacy immediately.

training.question: Do you offer training and onboarding?
training.answer: Yes! We provide comprehensive documentation, video tutorials, and one-on-one onboarding calls for Professional and Enterprise plans.

migration.question: Can I migrate my existing data?
migration.answer: Absolutely. Our team can help you migrate your existing product catalog, customer data, and inventory from your current system.

support.question: What kind of support do you provide?
support.answer: We offer email support for all plans, priority support for Professional plans, and phone plus chat support for Enterprise customers.

cta.title: Need immediate assistance?
cta.description: For urgent technical support, existing customers can access our priority support line.
